name: Chicken Sausage
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 pounds chicken legs and thighs, deboned (do not skin or trim fat)
1/2 pound pork fat, cut into large chunks
1 teaspoon dried parsley or 1 tbsp minced fresh parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Work the chicken and pork fat through a meat grinder using a small-holed disc, alternating ingredients.
2. Add all the remaining ingredients and combine thoroughly.
3. Form the mixture into patties, using about 1/2 cup for each.
4. Preheat a medium nonstick frying pan over medium-low heat.
5. Add the patties, cover, and cook for 5 to 7 minutes or until lightly browned.
6. Flip the patties and cook for another 5 to 7 minutes.
The Chicken Sausage has a refrigerator shelf life of 5 days and may be frozen, uncooked, for up to 6 months.
YIELD: about 8 sausage patties
